mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leaderboard_instance (leaderboard_id, instance_seq, start_time, end_time, status, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{leaderboardId}, #{instanceSeq}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM leaderboard_instance WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM leaderboard_instance WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId} ORDER BY instance_seq DESC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(instance_seq), 0) FROM leaderboard_instance WHERE leaderboard_id = #{leaderboardId}
